title: Supercoaster
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:Supercoaster.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Supercoaster]]
The '''Supercoaster''' was a proposed roller coaster, meant to be located on the surface of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. Based on a design in the popular ride from the [[Imperial Amusement Park]] located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but sixteen times larger, the Supercoaster relied on a dedicated [[drive generator]] and [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]]. The attraction plunged riders at near superluminal velocities, hurtling toward the [[Quadanium steel/Legends|quadanium steel]] surface, pulling up at the last second into a trench run.<ref name="DSD">''[[Death Star Designer]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has stated that, while most items, like the supercoaster and [[Ferris Wheel]] are entered for fun, much of the other information is included in the [[Holocron continuity database]], and is [[canon]]. The inclusion of the supercoaster is a nod to [[Wikipedia: Thrillville|''Thrillville'']], another [[LucasArts]] game unrelated to [[Star Wars]].<ref name="Chee">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1075#16045442|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-13|time=4:49 PM}}</ref>
